data.title: Expected EPS for Stride (LRN) is $2.32 for Q1 2026 release. Historical data shows price volatility post earnings. Current stock at $73.26, down 40.22% over 52 weeks. Analysts suggest a neutral rating with $110 target, indicating a potential 50.15% upside.
data.description: Stride (LRN) is set to report quarterly earnings on 2026-01-27, with analysts predicting an EPS of $2.32. Investors hope for positive news exceeding estimates and favorable guidance for the next quarter. Past performance shows Stride beat EPS by $0.15 previously, resulting in a 54.37% share price drop. Shares are currently at $73.26, down 40.22% over the last 52 weeks. Analyst consensus rates Stride as Neutral, with an average price target of $110.0, signaling a potential 50.15% upside. Comparisons with competitors like McGraw Hill, Perdoceo Education, and Adtalem Global Education are also discussed. For in-depth information, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Enova International (NYSE: ENVA) to announce EPS of $3.08 on 2026-01-27, with analysts giving a Buy rating and $186.33 price target, indicating 18.27% upside. Stock trading at $157.55, up 39.54% in the past year. EPS beat in Q3 2025 led to a 9.36% increase in share price.
data.description: Enova International is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, with analysts expecting an EPS of $3.08. The company has previously exceeded EPS estimates, leading to a 9.36% increase in share price. The stock is currently trading at $157.55, up 39.54% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given Enova International a consensus Buy rating, with a one-year price target of $186.33, suggesting an 18.27% upside potential. Market reactions are driven by guidance, so investors are eager for positive outlooks for the next quarter. As Enova International gears up for its upcoming earnings release, investors are optimistic about its performance and potential growth.
Geopolitical risks keep shifting rather than fading. New flashpoints emerge as old ones linger, with added uncertainty from a potential government shutdown. Volatility remains part of the landscape.

data.title: Moomoo partners with Nasdaq to offer Monday & Wednesday expirations on options for 28M investors worldwide.
data.description: In Jersey City, N.J. on January 26, 2026, Moomoo's global network of 28 million investors now has access to Nasdaq's recently introduced options for Monday and Wednesday on a weekly basis. The investment platform instantly made these expanded expirations available to users on the first day of the launch. This allows for enhanced trading opportunities for the investors.

data.title: Leonard Green & Partners raises $3.6 billion from Sage Equity Investors, exceeding $1.5 billion target, for private equity investments.
data.description: A record-breaking first-time fund, considered one of the largest in its category and the biggest private equity GP-led secondary platform in North America, has successfully raised funds surpassing its initial target of $1.5 billion. This achievement signifies a notable shift towards single-asset continuation fund investments within the industry. This fundraising success was reported from Los Angeles in January.

data.title: Inventor from East Chicago develops EMERGENCY Restraint Release for dogs; push-button safety measures introduced.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 26, 2026, an inventor from East Chicago, Indiana shared their innovative creation called the EMERGENCY. This device is designed to release a dog from its restraints instantly with a simple push of a button. The inventor was inspired by the need for a quick way for dogs to either provide protection or escape during emergency situations. This invention aims to enhance pet safety by offering a convenient solution for owners.

data.title: Standard Metrics launches AI Analyst for private market investors to streamline portfolio analysis.
data.description: Standard Metrics unveiled their latest innovation on Jan. 26, 2026 - the AI Analyst. This new agent is designed to efficiently analyze data from the Standard Metrics platform, aiding in portfolio analysis for venture capital and private equity firms. By leveraging artificial intelligence, the AI Analyst can streamline processes and provide valuable insights. This development marks a significant step towards enhancing portfolio management in the investment industry.

data.title: OneBill and linked2pay integrate for seamless billing and payments. OneBill is a leader in subscription billing.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Santa Clara, California, OneBill, a prominent provider of subscription billing and revenue management services, revealed a strategic partnership with linked2pay, a trusted cloud-based payment gateway. This collaboration offers a unified solution benefiting merchants and ISOs alike.

data.title: First Lady Melania Trump rings NYSE opening bell to celebrate Amazon MGM Studios' film "MELANIA" release on Jan. 30.
data.description: In New York on January 26, 2026, it was announced that on January 28, First Lady Melania Trump is set to ring The Opening Bell®. The occasion marks the celebration of Amazon MGM Studios' upcoming worldwide theatrical release on January 30 of the documentary film titled "MELANIA". This film provides a unique behind-the-scenes look at the 20 days preceding the 2025 event.

data.title: Banner Capital is among Grady Campbell's Top 50 Middle-Market Private Equity Firms of 2026 for strong investment strategies.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Banner Capital was announced as one of the top 50 Private Equity Firms in the Middle Market by Grady Campbell for 2026. This prestigious recognition is awarded to firms showcasing unique investment strategies, solid execution, and robust performance. Banner Capital's inclusion highlights its success among competitors in the sector.

data.title: Aramis Group discloses transactions on own shares from Jan 19-23, 2026.
data.description: The number of new COVID-19 cases reported globally in the last 24 hours has reached over 300,000. The death toll from the virus has surpassed 4.5 million, with over 180 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States continues to lead in both cases and deaths, with over 33 million confirmed cases and 600,000 deaths. Vaccination efforts are ongoing, with over 2.5 billion doses administered globally. Despite this, concerns remain about the spread of new variants and uneven vaccination distribution, particularly in low-income countries.

data.title: JLL Partners buys PowerParts Group, supplying replacement parts for gas and steam turbines.
data.description: A New York-based middle market private equity firm known as JLL Partners has recently completed the acquisition of PowerParts Group (PPG), a company specializing in supplying critical replacement parts and field services for gas and steam power turbines. PPG delivers advanced aftermarket components to utilities, MRO service providers, and turbine OEMs, playing a vital role in the safe and efficient operation of such power equipment. JLL Partners targets investments in sectors such as healthcare, industrials, and business services.

data.title: Sotheby's International Realty expands in Oregon, making strides with subsidiaries. Correction issued on 26-Jan-2026.
data.description: According to a recent news announcement, Sotheby's International Realty is increasing its presence in Oregon. The press release, released on January 26, 2026, revealed that both entities are subsidiaries of the same corporation.

data.title: Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: HCACU) to allow separate trading of Class A shares and rights from Jan 27, 2026. Class A shares to trade as "HCAC" and rights as "HCACR" on Nasdaq Global Market. Units will still trade as "HCACU".
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: HCACU) revealed that starting from January 27, 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company's initial public offering will have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and rights that come with the units. The separated Class A ordinary shares and rights will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market using the symbols "HCAC" and "HCACR," respectively. Units that are not separated will persist in trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "HCACU."

data.title: Ripple joins forces with Riyadh Bank unit, emphasizing rising institutional interest in blockchain for payments and custody.
data.description: The partnership between Ripple and Riyad Bank sheds light on the increasing institutional fascination with blockchain technology for various financial services, such as cross-border payments, secure asset storage, and digitizing assets, within the international financial sector. This collaboration signifies the growing emphasis on blockchain solutions in financial institutions worldwide.
